import pytest
from source import wrap

def test_wrap_trailing_words_included():
    text = "aaa bbb ccc"
    cols = 4
    expected = ["aaa", "bbb", "ccc"]
    result = wrap(text, cols)
    assert result == expected, f"Expected {expected}, got {result}"

attempts.test_code:
from source import wrap

def test_wrap_includes_trailing_words():
    """The wrap function should include all words, even the last one, when the
    remaining text is shorter than the column width."""
    text = "aaa bbb ccc"
    cols = 4
    result = wrap(text, cols)
    assert result == ["aaa", "bbb", "ccc"], (
        f"wrap('{text}', {cols}) returned {result!r} but should return ['aaa', 'bbb', 'ccc']"
    )
